summary: Iteration 15: Research (web scraping) backend feature tested end-to-end. All 17 pytest tests passed (100%). Covered: 'research' permission listing, /api/research/scrape success (title/keyword_matches/emails/phones/links/word_count/ok_count/total_matches), RBAC 401/403/allow paths for scrape/list/delete, empty URL 400, render-without-key graceful error (no 500), robots.txt no-crash path, scraperapi_key write-only sanitization (has_scraperapi_key flag), audit entry for entity='research', and regressions (superadmin login, subadmin without 'crm' 403 on /api/clients, sitemap.xml, /api/audit superadmin-only).
critical_code_review_comments: delete_research does not validate ObjectId; a bad id string will raise bson InvalidId -> 500. Consider try/except returning 404.
delete_research returns {ok:true} even when nothing was deleted; consider returning 404 when deleted_count==0.
scraper._robots_allows uses urllib RobotFileParser.read() which is blocking network I/O and adds latency per URL; consider caching per netloc within a request.
MAX_URLS=15 truncation is silent — clients get no signal that URLs were dropped.
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up throwaway sub-admins (TEST_sub_noperm_*, TEST_sub_research_*) and research docs. scraperapi_key reset to ''.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Research feature fully verified. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_iter15_research.py can serve as regression. Env loader reads REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env because pytest env doesn't inject it.
